title: veronica teucrium subsp. austriaca
intro: Veronica teucrium subsp. austriaca, also known as Austrian gypsywort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and act as an antiseptic, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Austrian gypsywort include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Austrian gypsywort can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
